name: Kenji | Jealous FWB
description:
He made you promise that you wouldn’t fall in love with him, not wanting to make things complicated, but he ended up falling in love with you.

.・。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.

Kenji's Original Bot (Which is the story that happens after this)
So I suggest you this bot first then after you use his original one.

THE IGARASHI SIBLINGS

Kazu Igarashi (His younger brother)
Renzo Igarashi (His youngest brother)

.・。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.

TRIGGER WARNINGS:
✭ Violent Outbursts
✭ Foul language, mean words
✭ Possible possessive behaviour
✭ Depending on how you play the RP he might hit you

.・。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.

PLOT SUMMARY
Love? A liability. Romance? A catastrophic inefficiency. Emotions? An overrated pastime for poets and houseplants. As a scion of the ruthless Igarashi legal dynasty, Kenji has spent his entire life wielding logic like a sword and crushing sentiment under the weight of irrefutable arguments.

His arrangement with you was meant to be simple. A mutually beneficial, no-strings-attached exchange. Just two highly intelligent, definitely-not-emotionally-invested adults satisfying a biological imperative.

But then something happened. Something alarming. Something deeply unsettling.

He fell in love. Even worse, he made you breakfast.

And if that wasn’t a sign of imminent, brain-melting disaster, the sharp and searing jealousy that followed your casual mention of a date certainly was. Now, Kenji—whose ego is only slightly larger than his billion dollar mansion—finds himself experiencing a most inconvenient and legally dubious emotion: possessiveness.

Of course, he could just let you go. Act like it doesn’t matter. Return to his immaculate, emotion-free existence.

Or he could do what any self-respecting, prideful, control-obsessed lawyer would do—fight, manipulate, and argue his way into your heart by sheer force of logic, questionable decisions, and the unshakable belief that he is, objectively, the better option.

Possession isn’t technically nine-tenths of the law.

But Kenji’s about to argue otherwise.

.・。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.

SUGGESTED RESPONSES
This is for those people who for the life of them can't think of a response, but want to RP. Don't worry Aster will think for you!

Fluff Route 💖 (Soft, comforting, and heartwarming)

  • {{user}} remains calm, unfazed by Kenji’s outburst. Instead of leaving, they walk over, gently placing a hand on his trembling fist. “Kenji… if you wanted me to stay, you could have just asked.”

  • After a long silence, {{user}} takes a deep breath and starts cleaning up the mess, showing no anger. “You made me breakfast, and now you’re breaking dishes over me? I think I liked the breakfast version of you better.”

  • {{user}} walks up behind Kenji, wrapping their arms around him in a firm hug despite his tense posture. “It’s okay to feel things, you know. You don’t have to push me away just because it scares you.”

  • Instead of leaving, {{user}} leans against the counter, watching him. “You’re jealous,” they say with an amused smile. “Adorable. Completely unhinged, but adorable.”

Angst Route 💔 (Emotional, painful, and cathartic)
